items.title: Restart Cosmo on your Local machine
items.note: Cosmo hasn't been restarted since the last round of updates, so the CFO's new rules and fixes aren't live yet. SSH into your Local machine (192.168.1.73) and restart it. Command: pkill -f cosmo.py && nohup python3 ~/Cosmo/cosmo.py >> ~/Cosmo/cosmo.log 2>&1 &

items.title: Connect Cosmo to the CFO agent
items.note: Once Cosmo is back up, this lets you ask Cosmo from Telegram to kick off your financial report — instead of triggering it by hand each time. It's a small one-time setup. Can't be done until Cosmo is confirmed running.

items.title: Lock in the Signature Video — name, price, and split
items.note: This is a premium product WRM wants to offer. It needs a name, a price, and an agreed split between you and Tyler. Until those three things are decided, marketing can't promote it and the CFO can't track it.

items.title: Export the Welcome deck as a PDF
items.note: Export the v15 Welcome deck PPTX from PowerPoint as a PDF, then run: python3 ~/Desktop/Claude\ Outputs/Design/set_pdf_spread.py <file.pdf>

items.note: A background agent that scans your Brain notes for open questions and gaps, and starts researching them before you need the answers. Spec is locked.

items.note: A new dashboard view that shows everything as a dependency map — goals at the end, tasks and systems in between, with lines showing what blocks what. Spec is locked.

items.title: F1 Pit Wall
items.note: Live F1 timing dashboard running at ~/Projects/f1-pitwall/ on port 8765. Shows timing, tyre strategy, and lap chart live. Restart: kill $(lsof -ti :8765); nohup /opt/homebrew/bin/python3.11 ~/Projects/f1-pitwall/server.py > /tmp/f1-pitwall.log 2>&1 &
